CustomField.label: Service Resource
CustomField.description: ServiceResource assigned to this NEPA process team role. Populated by NEPA_Team_Assembly_Orchestrator during GIS-driven auto-assembly. Null for manually added team members or assignments predating this field. Cleared (SetNull) if the ServiceResource record is deleted.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Service Resource (specialist) assigned to this team role. Auto-populated when the team is assembled from GIS protection layer detection.
